SEC.151: ACT-PERIOD HUD-SECRETARY MAY USE PRIOR-FY UNOBLIGATED-BALANCES U/A 
  DEPT-OF-HUD—PUBLIC-AND-INDIAN-HOUSING—TENANT-BASED-RENTAL-ASSISTANCE 
  SECOND-PARA → SUPPORT SUBPARA-D(P1) ∧ SUBPARA-B(P4) → PREVENT 
  RENTAL-ASSISTANCE TERMINATION DUE CY2024 FUNDING-INSUFFICIENT.
PROVISO: REPURPOSED AMTS PREV DESIG CONG EMERGENCY-RQMNT (CONCURRENT-RES/
  BBEDCA85) ⇔ EMERGENCY-RQMNT U/S 251(b)(2)(A)(i) BBEDCA85.

SEC.152: ACT-PERIOD 10USC§517 ↛ APPLY TO COAST-GUARD.

DIVISION B: EXTENSIONS  
TITLE I: MISCELLANEOUS EXTENSIONS

SEC.101: HOMELAND-SECURITY-ACT2002§210G(i) STRIKE "OCTOBER 1, 2024" →  
  INSERT "DECEMBER 20, 2024".

SEC.102: HOMELAND-SECURITY-ACT2002§708(b)(13) SUBSTITUTE "DECEMBER 20, 2024"  
  FOR "SEPTEMBER 30, 2024".

SEC.103: FEDERAL-CYBERSECURITY-ENHANCEMENT-ACT2015§227(a) STRIKE  
  "SEPTEMBER 30, 2024" → INSERT "DECEMBER 20, 2024".

SEC.104: CHESA-OHIO-CANAL-DEV-ACT§6(g) STRIKE "40" THRU PERIOD →  
  INSERT "ON DECEMBER 20, 2024."

SEC.105: CONSOLIDATED-APPROPS-ACT2023(DIV-HH)§501 AMEND:
  §501(a)(4)(A)(iii): STRIKE "TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PRACTICABLE,"
  §501(a)(5):
    PREAMBLE: "OCTOBER" → "DECEMBER"
    (A): STRIKE "TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PRACTICABLE,"
    (C): STRIKE TRAILING "AND"
    REDESIGNATE (D)→(E)
    INSERT (D): COMPARISON OF STATE PLANS U/A §501(b)(1)(A);
    (E): INSERT "AND PROACTIVELY" AFTER "CONSISTENTLY"
  §501(b)(2)(C): "SEPTEMBER 30, 2024" → "DECEMBER 20, 2024"
  + §501(e) COMPTROLLER-GENERAL REPORT U/NLT 1YR:
    EXAMINE SNAP-EBT PAYMENT-SECURITY RISKS (SKIMMING/CLONING/…);
    ASSESS DEPT-AG PAYMENT-SECURITY VS INDUSTRY-PRACTICES; STATE/RETAILER
    RISK-MGMT; SEC GUIDANCE/OVERSIGHT ON STOLEN-BENEFITS;
    RECOMMEND POLICY-OPTIONS TO IMPROVE RISK-MGMT ∧ SHARE IMPROVEMENTS.

SEC.106: AGRIC-2014§8302(b) SUBSTITUTE "1 DAY AFTER DECEMBER 20, 2024" FOR  
  "OCTOBER 1, 2023".

SEC.107: AGRIC-2014§8206(b)(2)(C)(ii) SUBSTITUTE "1 DAY AFTER DECEMBER 20,  
  2024" FOR "OCTOBER 1, 2024".

SEC.108: FOOD-FOR-PEACE-ACT(7USC1691 ET SEQ) AUTHORITIES AS OF  
  SEPTEMBER 30, 2024 REMAIN EFFECTIVE THROUGH DECEMBER 20, 2024.
